# Story 7 — Deploy Service

**As a developer**  
I need to deploy the microservice  
So that it is accessible in a cloud environment

## Details

- Containerize application using Docker
- Deploy to Kubernetes/OpenShift

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Given a Docker image
- [ ] When deployed to Kubernetes
- [ ] Then the service should be accessible

- [ ] Given deployment configuration
- [ ] When applied
- [ ] Then pods should run successfully
